version.description: The string representation of the node current version.

last_seen_at.description: An ISO-8604 timestamp representation of node last seen date.

created_at.description: An ISO-8604 timestamp representation of node creation date.

updated_at.description: An ISO-8604 timestamp representation of node update date.

config_applied_at.description: The time the node succeeds in applying the configuration.

config_version.description: The version number of the configuration applied by the node.
